response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack and AI-agent infrastructure experience, particularly at re:cinq, where he contributes to Model Context Protocol (MCP) code generators and agentic workflows. While his AI/GenAI experience is not as extensive as the role requires, his technical leadership, cloud platform exposure, and ability to design scalable systems align well with the core responsibilities. His open-source contributions and mentorship further bolster his candidacy.
strengths: Proven technical leadership and mentorship, including organizing workshops and code katas.
Hands-on experience with AI-agent infrastructure (e.g., MCP, agentic workflows) and cloud platforms (AWS, Kubernetes).
Strong full-stack development skills in TypeScript, Node.js, and diverse languages, with a focus on scalability and testing.
concerns: Limited explicit mention of 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions (required qualification).
No direct evidence of expertise in vector databases or RAG architectures in the resume.
Lacks a Master's/PhD in AI or related field (preferred qualification).
